title: Error Handling and Transactions
description: Handle errors and use transactions for data integrity.

slides.title: Error Handling with PDO
Error Handling Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
try {
    $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $user, $pass, [PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION]);
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare('SELECT * FROM non_existent_table');
    $stmt->execute();
} catch (PDOException $e) {
    echo 'Query failed: ' . $e->getMessage();
}
?>

slides.title: Transactions
Transaction Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$pdo->beginTransaction();
try {
    $pdo->exec("UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - 50 WHERE id = 1");
    $pdo->exec("UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance + 50 WHERE id = 2");
    $pdo->commit();
    echo "Transfer complete.";
} catch (Exception $e) {
    $pdo->rollBack();
    echo "Transfer failed: " . $e->getMessage();
}
?>

quizData.question: Which method commits a transaction?
quizData.explanation: commit() saves all changes made during the transaction.
